question: What method configures an awaiter used to await a Task and allows specifying a boolean parameter?
supporting_sentences:
Configure
Await(Boolean)

Configures an awaiter used to await this 
Task
.

question: Which method creates a continuation that executes when the target Task completes and receives caller-supplied state information, a cancellation token, and uses a specified scheduler?
supporting_sentences:
Continue
With(Action<Task,Object>, Object, Cancellation
Token, Task
Continuation
Options, Task
Scheduler)

Creates a continuation that receives caller-supplied state information and a cancellation token and that executes when the target 
Task
 completes. The continuation executes based on a set of specified conditions and uses a specified scheduler.

question: What method creates a task that completes after a specified number of milliseconds and can be cancelled using a cancellation token?
supporting_sentences:
Delay(Int32, Cancellation
Token)

Creates a cancellable task that completes after a specified number of milliseconds.

question: Which method queues the specified work to run on the thread pool and returns a Task object representing that work, with an option to cancel the work if it hasn't started?
supporting_sentences:
Run(Action, Cancellation
Token)

Queues the specified work to run on the thread pool and returns a 
Task
 object that represents that work. A cancellation token allows the work to be cancelled if it has not yet started.

question: What method creates a task that will complete when all of the Task objects in an enumerable collection have completed?
supporting_sentences:
When
All(IEnumerable<Task>)

Creates a task that will complete when all of the 
Task
 objects in an enumerable collection have completed.
